title: Breakout Game
text:
For one of our Object Oriented Programming homework assignments, we were tasked to create a version of the game breakout from the ground up, I found it to be a fun exercise!
Github Repo

title: Max Clifford
text:

title: Forecasting MISO Energy Usage
text:
My capstone presentation for Statistics 452, Correlated Data. We took a look at how the Mid-Continent Independent System Operators handle their own forecasting of energy usage within the mid-west.
Here is a link to the slide-show that I presented for capstone day.
